description_long: This is a hard-shell urban helmet with a smooth, rounded profile and a two-tone color scheme of white and teal. The helmet features a series of rectangular ventilation slots arranged in two parallel rows running from the front to the back, providing airflow for the wearer. The lower rear and side portions are colored teal, while the upper and front sections are white, creating a visually distinct separation. Black adjustable straps extend from the sides and meet under the chin, likely secured by a buckle. The surface appears slightly glossy, with a subtle texture visible in the teal areas. No visible branding or graphic designs are present, giving the helmet a clean and functional appearance.
description: A smooth, two-tone urban helmet with rectangular ventilation slots and black adjustable straps, featuring a white upper section and teal lower rear and sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white upper dome with two rows of rectangular vents and black straps hanging down.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlights the teal section wrapping around the lower back and side, with visible vents and strap attachment.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full extent of the teal lower section, the symmetrical vent pattern, and both straps.
description_view_3: Opposite side-rear view mirrors view 1, showing the teal and white color split and the strap connection.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Eight rectangular vents arranged in two parallel rows from front to back, evenly spaced across the top and rear of the helmet.
